expansionPolicy: Start with these 10-20 dogfooding tasks. Expand toward 30-100 by adding newly completed tasks to the calibration split only; holdout tasks are frozen and never used to fit thresholds. New detector or profile versions start a fresh stratum.

tasks.source: Synthetic: small bug fix accepted on the first attempt.
Synthetic: bug fix rejected at the routed class.
Synthetic: clean fix with human correction time.
Synthetic: feature escalated from standard to premium.
Synthetic: frontier change accepted trivially, later escaped defect.
Synthetic: economy refactor with review findings.
Synthetic: premium refactor with an expanded failure set on retry.
Synthetic: docs task with no recorded outcome yet.
Synthetic: economy docs change accepted cleanly.
Synthetic: malformed outcome file, tolerated and counted.
Synthetic: well-versioned artifacts with wrong-typed consumed fields (string retryCount, non-object attempt progress, non-numeric selection.relativeCost); counted as malformed, never guessed.
Synthetic: well-versioned outcome missing the schema-required retryCount field entirely; malformed, never defaulted to zero.
Synthetic: well-versioned outcome with a wrong-typed provider field (a number, not a string); malformed, never silently read as absent.
Synthetic: accepted outcome whose sole attempt omits the schema-required routingPlanArtifactId; the attempt is malformed and excluded, so its relative cost is unknown rather than zero.
Synthetic holdout: feature accepted at standard.
